roa.docketEntryComment: Pre-Sentenced Defendant Electronic Monitoring Release with Coordinated Pickup
Agreement and Order Releasing Defendant on Own Recognizance

/CAL:SHERIFF AFFADAVIT WARRANT/CTORD:SHERIFF AFFADAVIT WARRANT IS ADMINISTRATIVELY RECALLED AND DISCHARGED/SHER/BAIL:10000/CONTD ACM ELIG RPT, DOP/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/CONTD:ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIGIBILITY REPORT 10-01-20 D50/DOP/X:TRIAL DATECONFIRMED/

/CAL:CLARIFICATION OF RELEASE/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMSOF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:FUTURE DATE CONFIRMED/

/CAL:STATUS OF CUSTODY/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALLBE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/CTORD:7PM AND 7AM CURFEW/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SA1:JAMIL TAWASHA/SA2:622 HOLLOWAY AVE SF CA 94112/SAORD3/SAORD/X:TRIAL DATE CONFIRMED/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURR,/NTW/LDTR:10-14-20/987,2/SHER/BAIL:10000/X:BAIL SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE/CONTD:DEFENSE BAIL MOTION 09-15-20/CONTD:TRIAL 10-06-20 D17/DOP/
/CAL:JURY TRIAL/DAWT/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE IN DEPT 50/DOPC/CONTD:JURY TRIAL IN DEPT 17/DOPC/LDTR:10-14-20/
/CAL:ACM ELIGIBILITY REPORT/DAWT/X:DEFENDANT NOT ELIGIBLE FOR ACM/X:TRIAL DATE IS CONFIRMED/
